name: Autonomyx Web Scraper + RAG Indexer
description: Accept any URL. Crawl single page or entire site (configurable depth). Extract structured data from each page using Qwen3-30B. Generate embeddings via nomic-embed-text. Store chunks + vectors in SurrealDB Cloud for future RAG. Returns collection name for downstream RAG queries.

extract_schema.placeholder: Leave empty for default schema (title, summary, topics, entities)

code.value:
from langflow.custom import Component
from langflow.io import MessageTextInput, Output
from langflow.schema.message import Message
import httpx, json, time

class PlaywrightScraper(Component):
    display_name = 'Playwright Scraper'
    description  = 'Calls Playwright sidecar to crawl URL and index into SurrealDB'

    inputs = [
        MessageTextInput(name='url',             display_name='URL'),
        MessageTextInput(name='depth',           display_name='Depth',          value='0'),
        MessageTextInput(name='max_pages',       display_name='Max Pages',      value='20'),
        MessageTextInput(name='collection_name', display_name='Collection',     value=''),
        MessageTextInput(name='tenant_id',       display_name='Tenant ID',      value='default'),
        MessageTextInput(name='extract_schema',  display_name='Schema (JSON)',  value=''),
    ]
    outputs = [Output(name='result', display_name='Scrape Result', method='scrape')]

    PLAYWRIGHT_URL = 'http://playwright:8400'
    POLL_INTERVAL  = 5    # seconds between status polls
    MAX_WAIT       = 600  # 10 min timeout

    def scrape(self) -> Message:
        url     = self.url.text if hasattr(self.url, 'text') else str(self.url)
        depth   = int(self.depth.text if hasattr(self.depth, 'text') else self.depth)
        pages   = int(self.max_pages.text if hasattr(self.max_pages, 'text') else self.max_pages)
        coll    = self.collection_name.text if hasattr(self.collection_name, 'text') else str(self.collection_name)
        tenant  = self.tenant_id.text if hasattr(self.tenant_id, 'text') else str(self.tenant_id)
        schema_raw = self.extract_schema.text if hasattr(self.extract_schema, 'text') else str(self.extract_schema)

        payload = {
            'url':             url,
            'depth':           depth,
            'max_pages':       pages,
            'collection_name': coll or None,
            'tenant_id':       tenant,
            'extract_schema':  json.loads(schema_raw) if schema_raw.strip() else None,
        }

        # Start job
        r = httpx.post(f'{self.PLAYWRIGHT_URL}/scrape', json=payload, timeout=30)
        r.raise_for_status()
        job = r.json()
        job_id = job['job_id']

        # Poll until done
        waited = 0
        while waited < self.MAX_WAIT:
            time.sleep(self.POLL_INTERVAL)
            waited += self.POLL_INTERVAL
            status_r = httpx.get(f'{self.PLAYWRIGHT_URL}/job/{job_id}', timeout=10)
            status   = status_r.json()
            if status['status'] in ('done', 'failed'):
                break

        return Message(text=json.dumps(status, indent=2))

node.description: Calls Playwright sidecar. Polls until job complete. Returns JSON with collection name and stats.
JSON: job_id, status, pages_scraped, chunks_embedded, collection, rag_query_example

variables.name: PLAYWRIGHT_URL
variables.description: Internal URL of the Playwright sidecar service

pipeline.step_1_crawl: Playwright (Chromium headless) crawls URL. Blocks images/fonts/media. Respects robots.txt.
pipeline.step_2_chunk: Text split into 512-char chunks with sentence-boundary awareness.
pipeline.step_3_extract: Qwen3-30B extracts structured JSON per page (title, summary, topics, entities, sentiment).
pipeline.step_5_store: Chunks + embeddings stored in SurrealDB Cloud with MTREE vector index.

important_notes: Playwright sidecar requires shm_size: 256m in docker-compose — Chrome crashes without it
depth=0: single page only. depth=-1: full site (respect max_pages). depth=N: N levels.
Job is async — flow polls until complete (max 10 min). Large sites may timeout.
Embeddings stored in SurrealDB Cloud (AWS ap-south-1) — do not use for sensitive content
For private/sensitive content: use private node deployment with self-hosted SurrealDB
nomic-embed-text must be pulled: docker exec autonomyx-ollama ollama pull nomic-embed-text
Collection name auto-generated from domain if not specified. Same domain = same collection (upsert-safe).
